name: The Pool Room
description:
As you look about the pool room, you think to yourself, gee, if only I could
get Norm drunk enough to win money off of him.  Then you realize that 1) you
couldn't afford the money it would take to get him drunk, and 2) you really
don't think Norm would ever leave his stool unguarded.  You see a pool table
and pool sticks.  The bar stools are to east.
